completed_steps.description: Create core calculator components and logic
Add styling and polish the UI
Add advanced calculation modules and history
Implement data export and metrics tracking

files.content:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2020",
    "lib": ["DOM", "DOM.Iterable", "ES6"],
    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,
    "strict": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "node",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "baseUrl": ".",
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["src/*"],
      "@/components/*": ["src/components/*"],
      "@/hooks/*": ["src/hooks/*"],
      "@/utils/*": ["src/utils/*"],
      "@/types/*": ["src/types/*"],
      "@/constants/*": ["src/constants/*"],
      "@/services/*": ["src/services/*"],
      "@/stores/*": ["src/stores/*"],
      "@/styles/*": ["src/styles/*"],
      "@/assets/*": ["src/assets/*"]
    }
  },
  "include": ["src/**/*"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist", "build", ".next"]
}

steps.description: Create core calculator components and logic
Add advanced calculation modules and history
steps.commit_message: feat: implement advanced calculations and history

steps.description: Implement data export and metrics tracking
steps.commit_message: feat: add data export and performance metrics

steps.description: Add styling and polish the UI
steps.commit_message: style: polish UI with Tailwind CSS
